baseline: SECOND-LIGHT PQ BASELINE: builds a 0.770-BPW artifact, functional output divergence ~0.688, NO capability pass
gate_law: Do not lower thresholds after seeing results to turn a gate green.
promotion_law: No family advances based only on weight reconstruction. The ranking signal is FUNCTIONAL output divergence (real reference forward, routed experts exercised). A geometry passes only if functional divergence materially beats the 0.688 baseline; capability tier requires an HF-validated forward.
scientific_question: Which full-rank representation geometry preserves GPT-OSS-120B function below one complete physical bit per original weight?
